title: Journey from Single-Variable to Multivariable Differentiation
description: A flowchart showing the progression from ordinary differentiation to partial differentiation and the gradient, highlighting how single-variable concepts extend to multivariable functions.
relationships: Extends from a single input to multiple inputs
Is calculated by differentiating with respect to one variable while holding others constant
Is a vector composed of all partial derivatives
Describes the rate of change in any given direction, computed using the gradient
